name: Link member to partner - success
description: Documented success response when a loyalty program member is linked to a partner program. Mirrors the JSON example in the Response Bodies section (Link Program Member Partner) verbatim: linkNumber, message (null), status true. Request example mirrors the documented Link Program Member Partner Input example.
notes: METHOD DISCREPANCY: task expected PUT, but the Developer Guide v67.0 explicitly documents HTTP method = POST for this resource (line 21221). I returned POST to stay faithful to the authoritative source. Available version documented as 66.0 (not 67.0), and the resource-example URL in the doc uses v66.0, the API was introduced in 66.0. Resource path uses placeholders programName, membershipNumber, partnerName (doc literal segment names are 'programName'/'membershipNumber'/'partnerName'; I converted to {placeholders}). Both request properties (externalId, additionalAttributes) are Optional per the property table, no required body. The response 'message' field is shown as null in the documented success example and is described as the message displayed when a member is linked. No error/empty-case JSON example is provided in the doc, so only one success fixture was built (per instructions: add error case ONLY if doc shows one). 'status' Boolean indicates success(true)/failure(false) but the doc gives no example of a false/failure payload. Note casing: additionalAttributes and externalId are lowerCamelCase; the additionalAttributes example key 'Card_Type__c' is a Salesforce custom-field API name (implementer-defined). Response field names: linkNumber, message, status. Filter Group for all response fields is 'Big, 66.0'.
